languages.text: {n}Речь некрона напоминает металлический лязг, перемежающийся странно диссонирующими нотами.{/n} "Юдоль невежества вновь полнится теми, что рыщут во тьме его, но на сей раз ничтожных прибыло втрое против былого".

{n}The Necron's speech is akin to a metallic clang, interspersed with strangely dissonant notes.{/n} "Once again, the vale of ignorance is full of those who prowl in its darkness, but now thrice as many lowly have come as before."
languages.original_text: {n}Речь некрона напоминает металлический лязг, перемежающийся странно диссонирующими нотами.{/n} "Юдоль невежества вновь полнится теми, что рыщут во тьме его, но на сей раз ничтожных прибыло втрое против былого".

traits.locale_text: {n}The Necron's speech is akin to a metallic clang, interspersed with strangely dissonant notes.{/n} "Once again, the vale of ignorance is full of those who prowl in its darkness, but now thrice as many lowly have come as before."

{n}The Necron's speech is akin to a metallic clang, interspersed with strangely dissonant notes.{/n} "Once again, the vale of ignorance is full of those who prowl in its darkness, but now thrice as many lowly have come as before."

{n}The Necron's speech is akin to a metallic clang, interspersed with strangely dissonant notes.{/n} "Once again, the vale of ignorance is full of those who prowl in its darkness, but now thrice as many lowly have come as before."

languages.text: {n}太空死灵的言语如同金属撞击般回荡，夹杂着诡异失谐的音节。{/n}“无知的幽谷再一次挤满了在黑暗中游荡的身影。但如今前来的卑贱者是先前的三倍。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron's speech is akin to a metallic clang, interspersed with strangely dissonant notes.{/n} "Once again, the vale of ignorance is full of those who prowl in its darkness, but now thrice as many lowly have come as before."

traits.locale_text: {n}太空死灵的言语如同金属撞击般回荡，夹杂着诡异失谐的音节。{/n}“无知的幽谷再一次挤满了在黑暗中游荡的身影。但如今前来的卑贱者是先前的三倍。”

languages.text: {n}Las palabras del Necrón son como sonidos metálicos intercalados con unas extrañas notas discordantes.{/n} «El valle de la ignorancia vuelve a estar mayormente ocupado por aquellos que acechan en la oscuridad, pero hoy se me aproxima el triple de indignos que la última vez».
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron's speech is akin to a metallic clang, interspersed with strangely dissonant notes.{/n} "Once again, the vale of ignorance is full of those who prowl in its darkness, but now thrice as many lowly have come as before."

traits.locale_text: {n}Las palabras del Necrón son como sonidos metálicos intercalados con unas extrañas notas discordantes.{/n} «El valle de la ignorancia vuelve a estar mayormente ocupado por aquellos que acechan en la oscuridad, pero hoy se me aproxima el triple de indignos que la última vez».

languages.text: {n}La diction du Nécron rappelle un claquement métallique, entremêlé de notes étrangement dissonantes.{/n} « Une fois encore, le vallon de l'ignorance est rempli de ceux qui rôdent dans sa pénombre, mais aujourd'hui, c'est trois fois plus de créatures inférieures qui s'avancent. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron's speech is akin to a metallic clang, interspersed with strangely dissonant notes.{/n} "Once again, the vale of ignorance is full of those who prowl in its darkness, but now thrice as many lowly have come as before."

traits.locale_text: {n}La diction du Nécron rappelle un claquement métallique, entremêlé de notes étrangement dissonantes.{/n} « Une fois encore, le vallon de l'ignorance est rempli de ceux qui rôdent dans sa pénombre, mais aujourd'hui, c'est trois fois plus de créatures inférieures qui s'avancent. »

languages.text: {n}Nekron'un konuşması, tuhaf bir şekilde uyumsuz notalarla serpiştirilmiş metalik bir çınlamaya benziyor.{/n} "Bir kez daha cehalet vadisi, karanlığında sinsice dolaşanlarla dolu. Fakat şimdi eskisinden üç kat daha fazla aşağılık görünüyor."
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron's speech is akin to a metallic clang, interspersed with strangely dissonant notes.{/n} "Once again, the vale of ignorance is full of those who prowl in its darkness, but now thrice as many lowly have come as before."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nekron'un konuşması, tuhaf bir şekilde uyumsuz notalarla serpiştirilmiş metalik bir çınlamaya benziyor.{/n} "Bir kez daha cehalet vadisi, karanlığında sinsice dolaşanlarla dolu. Fakat şimdi eskisinden üç kat daha fazla aşağılık görünüyor."

languages.text: {n}Die Sprache des Necron gleicht einem metallischen Klirren, das von seltsam dissonanten Tönen durchsetzt ist.{/n} "Einmal mehr ist das Tal der Ignoranz voll von jenen, die in der Dunkelheit lauern, aber jetzt kommen dreimal so viele Niedere wie zuvor."
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron's speech is akin to a metallic clang, interspersed with strangely dissonant notes.{/n} "Once again, the vale of ignorance is full of those who prowl in its darkness, but now thrice as many lowly have come as before."

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Sprache des Necron gleicht einem metallischen Klirren, das von seltsam dissonanten Tönen durchsetzt ist.{/n} "Einmal mehr ist das Tal der Ignoranz voll von jenen, die in der Dunkelheit lauern, aber jetzt kommen dreimal so viele Niedere wie zuvor."

languages.text: {n}ネクロンの言葉は金属の打撃音のように響き、奇妙に不協和な音色が織り交ぜられている{/n} 「再び、無知の谷は闇を徘徊する者で溢れている。だが今や、かつてより三倍の数の卑劣な者たちがやって来た」
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron's speech is akin to a metallic clang, interspersed with strangely dissonant notes.{/n} "Once again, the vale of ignorance is full of those who prowl in its darkness, but now thrice as many lowly have come as before."

traits.locale_text: ネクロンの言葉は金属の clang と似ており、奇妙な不協和音で彩られている。 「再び、無知の谷は闇を徘徊する者で溢れている。だが今や、かつてより三倍の数の卑劣な者たちがやって来た。」
